---
title: "#mentorship_program_microstasis"
format: gfm
---

## 2022-03-02

**Pedro Sanchez** (12:17:30):
> @Pedro Sanchez has joined the channel

**Pedro Sanchez** (12:17:31):
> set the channel description: Channel to communicate about the first Bioconductor mentorship program cycle. Mentee is Pedro Sánchez-Sánchez and the project could be named as microSTASIS

**Dario Strbenac** (12:17:52):
> @Dario Strbenac has joined the channel

**Davide Risso** (12:17:52):
> @Davide Risso has joined the channel

**Pedro Sanchez** (12:19:52):
> Just to send a first message, we’ll meet on March the 14th to chat again:smile:


## 2022-04-11

**Dario Strbenac** (03:00:10):
> Ah, I only just noticed this channel!


## 2023-01-21

**Hien** (16:02:59):
> @Hien has joined the channel

**Hien** (16:15:46):
> @Hien has left the channel


## 2023-02-07

**Daniel Adediran** (12:22:25):
> @Daniel Adediran has joined the channel


## 2023-09-04

**Anna Lewkowicz** (16:52:41):
> @Anna Lewkowicz has joined the channel


## 2024-05-14

**Lori Shepherd** (10:15:37):
> archived the channel
